zh.East Grinstead, Sussex, England: 英國素可易亞斯特 格林斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Shelvestrode於大約1343年出生在英國素可盧加沙拉爾時，她的父親John Shelvestrode34歲，母親Margaret de Camoys27歲。她與John de Aske結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年在英國越可爾奧頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.Howden, Yorks, England: 英国英格兰越可爾豪登

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Shelvestrode于大约1343年出生在英国素可盧加沙拉爾时，她的父亲John Shelvestrode34岁，母亲Margaret de Camoys27岁。她与John de Aske结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年在英国越可爾奧頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Shelvestrode was born about 1343, in Lurgashall, Sussex, England, her father, John Shelvestrode, was 34 and her mother, Margaret de Camoys, was 27. She married John de Aske. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1394, in Aughton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Shelvestrode est née environ 1343, à Lurgashall, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Shelvestrode, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Camoys, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John de Aske. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1394, à Aughton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Shelvestrode um 1343 in Lurgashall, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shelvestrode 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Camoys 27. Sie hat John de Aske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1394 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Aughton, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Shelvestrode è nata il circa 1343 nel Lurgashall, Sussex, England, sua padre, John Shelvestrode, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Camoys, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John de Aske. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1394, nel Aughton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Shelvestrodeが約1343年にイギリススセックスルルガシャルで生まれた時，父John Shelvestrodeは34歳，母Margaret de Camoysは27歳であった。John de Askeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアウトンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Shelvestrode(이)가 대략 1343년 영국 수세스 루러가샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shelvestrode(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Camoys(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 John de Aske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 영국 요르크실르 오그h턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Howden, Yorks, England: Howden, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Shelvestrode nasceu aproximadamente 1343, em Lurgashall, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelvestrode, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Camoys, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Aske. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1394, em Aughton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Shelvestrode родилась около 1343 г. в местности лургашолл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Shelvestrode было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Camoys, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Aske. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1394 г. в местности аугтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Shelvestrode nació aproximadamente 1343, en Lurgashall, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shelvestrode, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Camoys, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John de Aske. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1394, en Aughton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
